subject: Re: Steve Kosslyn-Followup Epstein dinner
body:

--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

Hi Cecilia..

Could you please pass the below to Jeffrey. Martin
won't be there on
either 13 or 15 March. We could either hold the
dinner somewhere else
(e.g., the Harvard Faculty club, or a private room
at one of several
nearby restaurants) or we could reschedule. It's
really JEE's call...

Thanks,
s.

FROM Martin:

Date: Fri, 24 Feb 2006 08:11:51 -0500
To: "Stephen M. Kosslyn"
smkosslyn@wjh.harvard.edu
From: Martin Nowak nowak@fas.harvard.edu
Subject: Re: Followup Epstein dinner
Cc: "May H. Huang" mhuang@fas.harvard.edu,
Laura Abbott labbott@fas.harvard.edu
Status:

steve

i am away from 7 until 23 march.
could it be afterwards?

i would like to nominate steve pinker.

best wishes
martin
